name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Localize video text overlays into any language without rebuilding your visuals.
problem: Businesses expanding into new markets face the costly, time-consuming task of recreating video assets whenever they need translated text overlays. Redoing graphics, captions, and on-screen text manually breaks production workflows and inflates localization budgets. Visual Translate automates in-video text translation while preserving the original design and layout.
useCases: Localize marketing video campaigns for international audiences without redesigning assets
Translate product demo videos for regional sales teams
Adapt social media video content for multilingual markets at scale
Localize e-learning or training videos with on-screen text for global employees
